name: Apple
description: A currently immature concept formed from one user statement, one image-based perception record, and one user confirmation. Athena understands this as a visible object called apple, and the user says it is a kind of fruit.

attributes.name: roughly_round_shape
attributes.value: The observed example looks roughly round.

attributes.name: red_surface
attributes.value: The observed example has a mostly red surface with possible yellow highlight.

attributes.name: smooth_surface
attributes.value: The observed example appears smooth and slightly reflective.

attributes.name: possibly_has_top_stem_or_indentation
attributes.value: The observed example may have a darker top area, possibly a stem or indentation.

open_questions.question: 苹果是否总是红色的，还是也可能有其他颜色？

苹果内部是什么样的？有没有籽？
